dealerList.title: dealerList
dealerList.description: All dealers in pipe-delimited format: 1|DealerName|DealerId|VdaId|City|State. Parse by splitting on comma then pipe. Position 3 is dealerId (Account ID), position 4 is vdaId (VehicleDef_Dealer junction record ID).

message.title: message
message.description: Status message indicating whether dealers were found near pincode or all dealers are being shown.

pincodeMatched.title: pincodeMatched
pincodeMatched.description: True if dealers were found matching the user pincode exactly. False if showing all available dealers.

totalCount.title: totalCount
totalCount.description: Total number of dealers found for this vehicle and pincode combination.
